en: Okay, Benjamin, I'm gonna ask you one of our more telling questions for all of our interns
So I want you like this is the one to really think about okay, where do you see yourself in ten years?
Remember a few weeks ago, we talked about the senior intern program seniors in high school or college no no no
Seniors in life hold on what that's our founder and CEO Jules Austin any tips before I go in blink
Blink she hates when people don't blink it weirds her out. Hi Jules. I'm Ben your new intern
I'm glad you also see the humor in this be hard not to I will email you and I have something for you to do
I'll wait to hear from you sir
So you're Jules new driver no actually I'm her intern
Manager keeps busy mr. Congeniality everybody loves them you should dress to impress tuck in the shirt
Why doesn't anybody tuck anything in anymore? Oh, I'm asking you
